Graham_Dodd: Earning power, asset value and margin of safety; normalize earnings and avoid overpaying.
Buffett: Owner Earnings: reported earnings plus non-cash charges less maintenance capex required to maintain competitive position and unit volume.
Li_Lu: Understand the business, bear case, downside protection, ROIC/deployed capital and management integrity.
Howard_Marks: Think in ranges, control risk, prepare for cycles and avoid relying on one forecast.
Porter: Competitive advantage must be traced to activities in the value chain that create buyer value or lower cost.
